creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
After updating to latest version, launching LibreOffice from terminal (Konsole) throws the following error:

Shared object "libharfbuzz.so.0" not found, required by "libvcllo.so"

uname -a:
FreeBSD lisp 11.0-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p9 #0: Tue Apr 11 08:48:40 UTC 2017     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I am using KDE.
